## SECTION-d46c52c8-e06f-49bd-a6eb-608a6db1dbec @SECTION-020

> ReqIF.ChapterName: Web server

### REQUIREMENT: Web server @SDOC-SRS-126

> STATUS: Active

> RATIONALE: A web server is a precondition for StrictDoc's web interface. A web server can be available to a single user on their local machine or it can be deployed to a network and be made accessible by several computers.
